# Mario Marcolongo — Full Profile

## Who I Am
Mario Marcolongo is an independent researcher, web engineer, and open science builder based in Italy. He works at the intersection of biomedical evidence synthesis, software engineering, and public knowledge infrastructure.

## What I Do
- **Biomedical fact-checking**: 9+ years verifying scientific claims on Wikipedia — 4,317 total Wikimedia Foundation contributions (1,592 English Wikipedia, 1,249 Wikidata, 752 Italian Wikipedia, 684 Commons).
- **Engineering**: Browser extensions, serverless bots, genomic data pipelines, and cloud infrastructure — all open-source.
- **Open science platforms**: Founded Yourself to Science™ (yourselftoscience.org) — an open directory connecting people with research studies that need biological samples and health data.

## Key Projects

### Yourself to Science™ (yourselftoscience.org)
An open directory where anyone can find research studies that accept biological samples (DNA, tissue, blood) or digital health data (wearables, AI chat history). All data is CC0 public domain. Indexed in FAIRsharing and Zenodo.

### MDPI Citation Filter
A browser extension (Chrome & Edge) that flags papers from controversial publisher MDPI across Google Scholar and PubMed in real time. Open-source, Manifest V3.

### Entropy for Life (entropyforlife.it)
Sole web developer and biomedical fact-checker for one of Italy's biggest science YouTube channels — 245,000+ subscribers, 30M+ views, 300+ documentaries on evolutionary biology and genetics.

### Worldwide Referendum Quorum Map
Python pipeline that classifies referendum turnout requirements in 100+ countries and generates a publication-grade vector map. Published on Wikimedia Commons.

### 41× WGS Genomic Pipeline
Complete whole-genome sequencing analysis — alignment, ancestry correction via PCA, polygenic risk scoring (pgsc_calc/Nextflow), and pharmacogenomic variant screening against ClinVar.

### Wikipedia Link Converter Telegram Bot
Serverless bot on AWS Lambda that converts non-English Wikipedia links to English. Zero idle cost, automated CI/CD.

## Scientific Visualizations
Original vector diagrams published on Wikimedia Commons:
- Euler diagram of overlapping brain disorder gene mutations — adopted in 4 Wikipedia language editions and a Palgrave Macmillan textbook (2024)
- Benzo(a)pyrene contamination levels in processed yerba maté
- Global national positions on vegetarian diets in dietary guidelines
- Worldwide referendum turnout threshold map

## Research
- Focus Group Moderator & Research Facilitator at the University of Padua — clinical research on sexuality in the autism spectrum (Prof. Marta Panzeri), Nov 2022 – present.

## Contact & Availability
- Open to roles in the US, Europe, and remote.
- Interests: applied AI, research engineering, scientific tooling, open-source biomedical infrastructure.
